notes.mode: lev = futures, NO stop loss (your live style). Exits at profit targets only. Liquidation risk is real; see dashboard warnings.
notes.emergency_exit_adverse: set e.g. 0.10 to force-close any position 10% underwater. null = fully faithful to the backtested config (no safety net).
notes.source: research2/final_config_v6_lev_none.json; walk-forward OOS evidence: dashboard backtests 'walkforward_OOS_lev_survivor'.
